holdings.infoBox: SPRE is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prologis stock at 12.50%, Goodman Group at 12.41%, Welltower at 11.92%, Equinix at 11.86%, and Charter Hall Group at 5.66%.

overview.description: The SP Funds S&P Global REIT Sharia ETF (SPRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of Shariah-compliant global REITs. SPRE was launched on Dec 30, 2020 and is issued by SP Funds.
infoTable: S&P Global All Equity REIT Shariah Capped Index
